_provenance: Sample catalog state used by N8 smoke tests and the 48h soak baseline. Mirrors a realistic two-pack setup where Opus must choose between a lightweight CLI family (csvkit) and a heavyweight library (pandas) for the sample-task.md CSV analysis task. Drift here is a DECISIONS-worthy edit per planning/test-fixtures/README.md.

tools.name: csvstat
tools.description: Per-column statistics (min/max/mean/nulls) over a CSV file; handles quoted fields and UTF-8.

tools.name: csvsort
tools.description: Sort a CSV by one or more columns; preserves quoting and Unicode.

tools.name: csvgrep
tools.description: Filter CSV rows by column-value match (regex or literal).

tools.name: csvlook
tools.description: Pretty-print a CSV as an aligned table for terminal reading.

tools.name: pandas
tools.description: Python data-analysis library; DataFrame/Series primitives for in-process analysis.
